member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value. Code after the method is considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method is considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be .

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be .

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not- values.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have non- values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .
The field or property member that is promised to be not-.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output is not even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non- if the named parameter is non-.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name. The output will be non- if the argument to the parameter specified is non-.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non- if the argument to the parameter specified is non-.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be .

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.DI.IDependencyContainer
member.summary: Dependency injection container interface for registering and resolving services.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.DI.IHostedService
member.summary: Services that implement this interface will have their method called when the DI container is initialized (on game start). This allows them to perform any necessary setup at the appropriate time, such as registering event handlers. The service will be disposed when the game shuts down, allowing for any necessary cleanup.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.DI.IHostedService.OnScopeStart
member.summary: Called when the DI container is initialized (on game start). This allows the service to perform any necessary setup at the appropriate time, such as registering event handlers.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.ECS.Worlds.Store.ComponentIndex``2
member.summary:
Returns the index for indexed components to search entities with a specific component value in O(1).
Executes in O(1).

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.ECS.Worlds.Store.LinkComponentIndex``1
member.summary:
Returns the index for link components to search entities with a specific entity in O(1).
Executes in O(1).

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Idents.AreaId
member.summary: Identifies an area within the game world. Areas can be main Chapter maps, sub-areas such as the Zodiac Village, or hidden boss arenas. If going somewhere requires a loading screen, it's probably a different area.
member.param: The underlying ID value. This is not guaranteed to be stable across game versions, and should not be used for anything other than debugging or logging purposes.

member.name: M:ReadyM.Api.Idents.AreaId.#ctor(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Identifies an area within the game world. Areas can be main Chapter maps, sub-areas such as the Zodiac Village, or hidden boss arenas. If going somewhere requires a loading screen, it's probably a different area.
member.param: The underlying ID value. This is not guaranteed to be stable across game versions, and should not be used for anything other than debugging or logging purposes.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId
member.summary: A unique identifier for a player in the current session. This is not a persistent identifier and can change over time, especially if players disconnect and reconnect. It should be used for identifying players during the current session, but not for long-term storage or cross-session identification.

member.name: P:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId.Server
member.summary: The PlayerId representing the server itself. This can be used to identify actions or messages that originate from the server rather than any specific player.

member.name: P:ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId.Invalid
member.summary: An invalid PlayerId, which can be used to represent the absence of a player or an uninitialized state.

member.name: T:ReadyM.Api.Serialization.SerializableMode
member.summary: Defines how a struct should be serialized when using .
